rammed-earth-hero-wall.alt_text: A towering rammed-earth wall in low raking light, deep sediment strata running its full height.
rammed-earth-hero-wall.generation_prompt: Editorial architectural photograph, tall vertical full-height plate. A towering rammed-earth wall fills the frame floor to ceiling, raked by hard low afternoon light so the compressed sediment strata cast deep relief. High-contrast tonal study: deep umber shadow (#1C140D) on the shaded flank, warm burnt-sienna body (#A8472A) in the light, clay-taupe mid-tones (#857658), restrained bone-cream rim (#E0D2B8). Strong chiaroscuro, one third of the frame falling into near-black shadow. Tactile material gravity in the manner of Marvell Tile & Stone and Silent House editorial work. Medium format, 50mm equivalent, f/8, no people, no props, no clutter. Award-tier composition, museum-grade restraint. No text or logos.
rammed-earth-hero-wall.placement: hero right plate on index.html (full-height vertical)

rammed-earth-wall-01.alt_text: A monumental sun-warmed rammed-earth wall, horizontal sediment strata catching low afternoon light.
rammed-earth-wall-01.generation_prompt: Editorial architectural photograph, full-bleed cinematic plate. A monumental rammed-earth wall fills the frame in restrained composition, low afternoon sun raking across its compressed sediment strata. Tonal palette of paper-cream ground (#F0E9D6) at the seam of sky and burnt-sienna wall body (#B25C3C), clay-taupe undertones (#9C8E73), bone-cream highlights (#E8D9C3), umber shadow (#2D241A). Tactile material study in the manner of Marvell Tile & Stone editorial work; the wall reads as a single warm monolith with one subtle vertical seam at center. Medium format, 50mm equivalent, f/8, no people, no props, no clutter. Award-tier composition, museum-grade restraint. No text or logos.
rammed-earth-wall-01.placement: full_bleed_plate, first sienna horizon plate on index.html

work-opening-plate.alt_text: A long rammed-earth wall ending in a deep doorway, the seam between two pours running floor to lintel.
work-opening-plate.generation_prompt: Editorial architectural photograph, full-bleed cinematic plate. A long rammed-earth wall in warm afternoon light terminates in a deep oak-framed doorway; a clean vertical seam between two consecutive pours runs floor to lintel, exactly bisecting the composition. Warm-earth palette: paper-cream ground (#F0E9D6), burnt-sienna wall body (#B25C3C), bone-cream highlight on a dust-soft floor (#E8D9C3), umber shadow (#2D241A), clay-taupe mid-tone (#9C8E73). Silent House compositional discipline — asymmetric, monumental, no human figures, no decoration. Medium format, 35mm equivalent, f/8. No text or logos.
